about.en: Dogecoin is a proof-of-work blockchain originally created as a meme coin, used for payments and tipping.
about.es: Dogecoin es una blockchain de prueba de trabajo (proof-of-work) creada originalmente como meme coin, usada para pagos y propinas.
about.ca: Dogecoin és una blockchain de prova de treball (proof-of-work) creada originalment com a meme coin, usada per a pagaments i propines.
